都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing a dance to the viral “I Just Get So Nervy” song, folding up with wild pretzel-like moves just like @melaniatur. The nervous sound, bendy movement, and chaotic Triple T energy make this feel funny, weird, and instantly ready for TikTok green screen edits. What makes this work is how dramatic the movement gets. The “I just get so nervy” hook already feels anxious and over-the-top, but Tung Tung Tung Sahur twisting and folding like the beat is controlling his whole body makes the clip even more replayable. It has that perfect “why is Triple T built like a pretzel?” energy where brainrot chaos, viral dance timing, and Nervy trend humor all collide. Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

외로울 틈이 없어요! 염소들과 동네 주민들의 사랑을 독차지하는 2살 누렁이 🥰 외로울 틈 1도 없는 인싸 시골개 2살 누렁이 등장! 🐶 소 축사인 줄 알았는데 염소 농장이더라고요! 동네 주민분이 직접 허락도 받아주시고, 청소 내내 꼬마 친구랑 어르신들이 다 모이셨어요 ㅋㅋ 옆집 할머니는 누렁이 먹으라고 소고기 미역국까지 끓여오심 ㅠㅠ 강아지한테 안 좋다고 말씀은 드렸지만, 할머니의 찐 사랑이라 너무 세게 막진 못했네요. 앞으로는 꼭 조심해 주시길! 🥺 큰 지붕이 있어서 땡볕 걱정도 없고 염소 친구들도 있어서 완전 럭키비키한 환경! 그래도 오줌 자국 있길래 마당이랑 개집 시원하게 물청소 싹 때려줬습니다 💦 청소하다가 이웃분이 힘내라고 귀한 약물(?) 음료까지 주셔서 에너지 완충 완료! 💪 깨끗해진 그릇에 든든한 강아지 삼계탕 비벼주니 1분 컷 폭풍 먹방 ㅋㅋ 진드기 목걸이 채워주고, 가벼운 3M 와이어 목줄로 교체! 푹신한 새 담요까지 깔아주니 완전 좋아하더라고요 🥰 출연 허락해 주신 동네분들 너무 훈훈하고 힐링이었습니다! 영상 보며 따뜻한 마음 보내주시는 모든 분들 정말 감사합니다! 답글을 다 달아드리진 못하지만, 남겨주시는 소중한 댓글은 하나하나 꼼꼼히 다 읽고 있습니다! 늘 죄송하고 감사해요 🥺 마지막으로 제 프로필에 올려둔 링크를 클릭하신 후 리스팅된 쿠팡 제품을 한 번 더 클릭하여, 꼭 해당 제품이 아니더라도 24시간 안에 아무 물품이나 구매해 주시면 쿠팡으로부터 일정 수수료를 지급받아 이 아이들에게 더 맛있는 다음 배달을 준비하는 데 큰 도움이 됩니다. 늘 감사합니다 ✨ #강아지 #반려견 #애견 #시고르자브종 #감동영상 #trending #viraltiktok

Малышка йорк Ева 🌸 Иногда груминг не для красоты, а для комфорта и облегчения процедуры.  Ева была вынуждена сделать перерыв в процедурах, а дома не получалось во время ухаживать, но как только такая возможность появилась, то она сразу пришла убрать все лишнее 😉 Уважаемые клиенты, если Вы видите, что у Вас или у Ваших близких есть питомцы, которые нуждаются в уходе, то не стесняйтесь, записывайте малышей на груминг. Особенно это касается наших бабушек и дедушек, Вы можете помочь облегчить жизнь им и им питомцам 🙏🏾 #груминг #собака #йорк

Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, chili oil, minced garlic, and green onions on top of the cheese. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. Enjoy hot and creamy  #buldak #buldakramen #eat #food  #Foodie

Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic, minced 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil for topping Instructions Cook the noodles until just al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan over medium heat, melt the butter. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Stir in the Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix until thick, glossy, and well combined. Add chili oil, then pour in the heavy cream. Stir until smooth and creamy, letting it thicken slightly into that rich orange sauce. Add the noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella on top and let it melt into the sauce. Top with dumplings and sausages, cover, and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and a drizzle of chili oil. Use any toppings you love and make it your own 🔥 #buldak #buldakramen #ramenrecipes #creamybuldak #Foodie

Hot dog coreano 🌭🧀🇰🇷 👉 Massa:  • 1 ovo • 1 xícara de leite • 2 colheres de sopa de açúcar • 2 xícaras de farinha de trigo • 1 pitada de sal (opcional) • 1 colher de sopa de fermento  👉 Empanamento:  • Queijo mussarela • Panko • Palito de churrasco Cozinhe as salsichas antes de espetá-las no palito de churrasco. Você pode cortar o palito ao meio para facilitar na hora de fritar. Enrole duas fatias de queijo mussarela na salsicha e depois passe na massa. Em seguida, empane na panko. Deixei na geladeira por cerca de 10 minutos antes de fritar, mas isso não é obrigatório. Se não quiser consumir tudo na hora, dá para congelar. Só deixe os hot dogs separados uns dos outros para não grudarem. #hotdog #hotdogcoreano #lanche #receitafacil #capcut

Ultra Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic (minced) 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil (for topping) Instructions Cook noodles until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix well until it turns thick and glossy. Add chili oil and stir. Pour in heavy cream and mix until smooth, creamy, and slightly thickened (that rich orange color 🔥). Add noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and let it melt into the sauce. Add dumplings and sausages on top. Cover and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil drizzle. . #buldak #buldakramen #eat #cook #Foodie

A standout shoyu ramen spot in Tokyo. Their signature menu is the “Special Shoyu Ramen.” Built on a chicken-based broth blended with multiple soy sauces, the first sip brings out the richness of chicken oil, deep umami from the soy sauce, and a subtle sweetness. As you continue, the flavors finish clean and balanced. The charcoal-grilled chashu adds a gentle smoky aroma that naturally melts into the broth✨ The straight noodles hold the soup well, delivering its flavor all the way through each bite. The chashu comes in a variety of cuts, each prepared differently—from rich, fatty pieces to lighter, more delicate textures—letting you enjoy a contrast of juiciness and mouthfeel. [Ramen Sakurai 麺屋 さくら井] - Location: 2 Chome-15-27 Kamirenjaku, Mitaka, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Mon & Sat 11:30 - 15:00 / 18:00 - 20:30, Tue/Thu/Fri 11:30 - 15:00, Sun 11:30 - 16:00 (Closed Wed) - Menu: Special Shoyu Ramen (¥2,000) #ramen #tokyoramen #shoyuramen #라멘

Dumbbell Sumo Squat  Know the difference  1. Dumbbell Position Hold the dumbbell with both hands naturally hanging between your legs, rather than holding it at your chest. This allows you to lift heavier weights without being limited by arm strength. 2. Torso Posture Maintain a slight forward lean instead of staying fully upright. Leaning forward increases hip flexion, helping to stretch and better activate the glutes. 3. Stance Width and Foot Angle Set your feet about 1.5 times shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing outward at roughly a 45-degree angle. If the stance is too wide, the inner thigh muscles (adductors) will take over, reducing glute activation. 4. Load Path As you squat down, the dumbbell should not stay directly under your shoulders. Instead, it should fall slightly behind the midline, closer to your posterior chain. Bring your hands slightly inward to keep the load closer to your center of mass, which helps reduce lower back strain and improves movement efficiency. #gymtips #quads #gluteworkout #gym #gymrat

🇵🇭 Pork Adobo | Filipino Food Bible – Episode 1 My take on one of the most iconic Filipino dishes - Pork Adobo! This series will feature all filipino dishes in all their variations. consider this your guide to filipino cuisine. comment what you wanna see next! INGREDIENTS: Pork Adobo - 1.2 kg pork belly (or cut of choice) - 15–20 cloves garlic, minced (adjust to taste—more is always welcome) - 1 onion, chopped - 500 ml pork broth - 190 ml soy sauce - 100 ml cane vinegar - 3 long green chilies - 4 bay leaves - 1 tbsp whole peppercorns - 30 g palm sugar, chopped (adjust to sweetness) - Oil, for frying Toppings - Sliced onion leeks - Crispy garlic bits - Boiled eggs INSTRUCTIONS - Fry the pork until lightly browned on all sides, then remove and set aside. - In the same pot, sauté the garlic until lightly golden and fragrant. Add onions and cook until softened. - Return the pork to the pot, pour in the pork broth. Add the soy sauce, vinegar, green chilies, bay leaves, peppercorns, and palm sugar.  - Cover and let simmer on medium heat for 5-10 mins **don’t mix to allow vinegar to cook.  - Turn to low heat for 1–2 hours, until the pork is tender and the sauce has reduced. you want it to be almost swimming in its own fat like a confit - Optional: If serving with eggs, add the soft boiled eggs 2-3 mins before serving to retain jammyness - Serve over hot rice, topped with crispy garlic and leeks, and a hard-boiled egg on the side. Enjoy. #FilipinoFoodBible #filipinofood #asmr #cookingasmr #pinoyfood

Steak Ramen 🍜 #steak #ramen #soup  INGREDIENTS Soy Marinated Eggs * 4 soft-boiled eggs (6½ minutes, ice bath) * 1 cup soy sauce * ½ cup water * 2 tbsp mirin Gochujang Compound Butter * 4 tbsp softened butter * 1 tbsp gochujang * 1 tbsp toasted sesame seeds * 1 green onion, very thinly sliced * Pinch of salt * 1 ribeye Ramen broth: * 2–3 cloves garlic, minced * 1-inch piece ginger, minced * 1 tbsp laksa paste * 1 tbsp miso paste * 2 tsp soy sauce * 2 tsp mirin * ½ can coconut milk  * 1–1½ cups chicken broth * Cornstarch slurry (1 tsp cornstarch + splash water) * 1 portion ramen noodles * garnishes: extra scallions, toasted sesame, nori
